title: THEDEAD
description: a ginormous mod of ghoulish proportions for forge 1.20.1
body:
**A GINOURMOUS GHOULISH MOD (how spooky) JAM-PACKED WITH A MENAGARIE OF UNDEAD FEINDS!**

this mod has been in the works for a very long time, and is the first minecraft mod i have ever designed, though i am an experianced artist.
this mod is designed simply to add a host of new ghoulies into the game that fit into base minecraft and can easily fit alongside other undead themed mods (like born of chaos or undead revamped) but it does not rely on any mod for dependancies.
the spawning for these ghoulies is meant to feel natural, with most entities having unique spawning conditions.

a big part of this mod is the putrefaction system, which is a global variable ranging from 0 to 100.
it increases by 1 whenever a undead creature kills a living creature, and it decreases by 1/2 whenever a living kills an undead.

i took alot of inspiration from many different bits of media 
(aneurism IV, KGATLW, the warcraft series, the thing (yes, that thing), scape and run parasites, and a host of other things im sure i'll remember later)

the sound effects are mostly made by me, but i take a couple sound effects from the videogame adaption of "the thing" teamfortressn 2, halflife 2 and some stuff i dont exactly know the origin of.

**IF YOU HAVE _ANY_ QUESTIONS, PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE COMMENT OR JOIN MY ROTTEN DISCORD** (i like the attention :3 )
